name: MariaDB Development Environment
onCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y mariadb-server mariadb-client
postStartCommand: sudo service mariadb start && mysql -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS dev_db; CREATE USER IF NOT EXISTS 'root'@'localhost' IDENTIFIED BY 'password'; GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON *.* TO 'root'@'localhost'; FLUSH PRIVILEGES;"
